content.en:
"They're all down!"

A Shore-level genius trembled.

I thought that I wouldn't encounter danger this time, but I lost so many other world-level geniuses at once!

These other world-level geniuses are the pride of the major forces, and their future potential is unlimited.

If they hadn't come here, they wouldn't have been treated like this.

They also thought that this time was a chance, but they didn't expect it to be a disaster.

Once it falls, what's the use of more resources?

Then.

A genius of the other side level said: "Lord of Mystery, can I exit? It's too dangerous here, this is just the beginning, I'm afraid I really fall into this treasure land!"

"I want to quit too!"

Another Shore-level genius said.

The Lord of Xuan Miao saw that several other shore-level geniuses wanted to quit, and his face was quite ugly.

If all these other geniuses have run away, who does she rely on?

Could it be that we have to recruit another group of geniuses from the other side?

But those weak geniuses on the other side are too ordinary, and they are looking for death when they come in!

Only these top geniuses can hope to survive and be able to protect her.

And.

Once these other shore-level geniuses go out and publicize the danger here a little, I am afraid that they will not dare to come even more.

Therefore, she didn't want these other geniuses to leave.

"Everyone, if you continue to stay, the treatment will be doubled!"

The Lord of Mystic gritted his teeth.

Double the treatment!

These other side level geniuses hesitated, after all, as long as the treatment was good enough to a certain extent, it was enough to make them desperate!

"Lord of Mystery, it's not a matter of treatment, the key is those golden void bamboo bees, how to solve them?or, let's give up there?" asked a genius of the other side.

Abandon?

The Lord of Mystic naturally didn't want to give up.

With so many other level geniuses lost, and such precious treasures right there, how could they give up!

Then.

The Lord of Mystery looked at Ye Tian.

"Lord of Endless, are you sure you can kill a Golden Void Bamboo Bee alone?"

The Lord of Mystery asked.

"Sure!" Ye Tian nodded.

"Here's for you!"

The Lord of Mystery took out a treasure.

"This is the Silent Bell!" the Lord of Mystery introduced, "It is a special Origin Rule weapon refined by my ancestor, and you can use it to trap a Golden Void Bamboo Bee. In this way, the other Void Bamboo Bees can't kill you, and you can kill that Void Bamboo Bee inside the Silent Bell. "

"Good stuff!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

With such an Origin Rule weapon, he could indeed kill those Void Bamboo Bees one by one.

But.

In that environment just now, it was useless for the Lord of Mystic to use the Infinite Bell, she could only cover herself, and when the other other Shore-level geniuses ran away, she could only wait for death.

Therefore, this kind of treasure is only suitable for Ye Tian's use.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian took a moment to refine the Silent Bell, preparing to kill those Void Bamboo Bees.

See here.

The other other shore-level geniuses were not ready to leave, and they were here to heal their wounds one by one.

And the Lord of Mystery also promised to give Ye Tian enough benefits, such as the corpses of those golden void bamboo bees all belonged to him.

In addition, he also gave him a lot of the other side of the origin of the golden bamboo and the other side of the origin of the golden bamboo pith.

Otherwise, Ye Tian would not have been able to fight in vain!

......

The other side of the origin of the golden bamboo here.

Ye Tian came, and quickly drew out those golden void bamboo bees.

Immediately.

He sacrificed the amorphous bell.

Airplanes!

A golden void bamboo bee was covered by him.

One person and one bee entered the inside of the amorphous bell, and the other golden void bamboo bees could not break the amorphous bell in a short period of time.

No bell interior.

Ye Tian fought with this golden void bamboo bee.

Thundered!!!!

Ye Tian showed a complete golden body on the other side, the will of the Origin Realm, the rules of the origin of the other side, and all kinds of supernatural means on the other side.

It was a long time before he killed the golden void bee.

After breaking through the body of this Void Bamboo Bee, he obtained some Void Bamboo Honey.

The value of this golden Void Bamboo Honey is much higher than that of ordinary Void Bamboo Honey.

"Good stuff, put it away!"

Subsequently.

He walked out of the Amorphous Bell and continued to trap the second Golden Void Bamboo Bee in this way, and then killed it inside the Amorphous Bell.

And these void bamboo bees don't have a high IQ, so they don't know that if they continue like this, they will wait for death.

Time passes slowly.

Ye Tian killed one golden void bamboo bee after another.

Before he knew it, these golden void bees had all died on his hands.

"It's a pity that we can't take away all these Origin Golden Bamboos on the other side!"

If he did this, it would undoubtedly anger those other Shore Geniuses and Mysterious Masters.

But even if he doesn't take it, he can get a lot of benefits this time, and he should be satisfied.

......

"Lord of Mystery, I'm back!"

Ye Tian came to the Eight Gates Realm Killing Array.

Seeing that Ye Tian was back, the Lord of Mystery immediately asked, "Lord of Endless, have you killed those Golden Void Bamboo Bees?"

"Well, killed!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Seeing this, the other other shore-level geniuses were very excited.

And the Lord of Mystery beckoned: "Let's go, let's go to the Origin Golden Bamboo on the other side!"

Soon, they were back here again, and then checked, there were indeed no Golden Void Bamboo Bees.

Seeing this, these other shore-level geniuses had to admire Ye Tian's strength.

They are not opponents at all in the face of these golden void bamboo bees, and they will be killed by them.

But Ye Tian can kill these golden void bamboo bees, this is the crushing of strength!

"Let's cut down these Origin Golden Bamboos on the other side!"

The Lord of Mystery shouted.

Next.

One by one, these other shore-level geniuses began to cut down the Origin Golden Bamboo on the other side.

Click!

A Origin Golden Bamboo from the other side was cut off, and then handed over to the Lord of Mystery.

As time passed, one after another of the Origin Golden Bamboo on the other side fell into the hands of the Lord of Mystery.

After all of them are cut down, they will be distributed by the Lord of Mystery.

Of course.

Those who have found the other side of the Origin Golden Bamboo Pulp will also be distributed by the Lord of Mystery.

There were about a thousand Origin Golden Bamboos on the other side here, but it didn't take too long, and these Origin Golden Bamboos on the other side were all cut down.

"Lord of Mystery, the Origin Golden Bamboo on the other side has been cut down!"

A peer-level genius said.

"Okay, I'll distribute the harvest here to everyone now!"

The Lord of Mystery also knew very well that if they didn't give benefits, these other shore-level geniuses would have no bottom in their hearts, and they would not be willing to continue exploring this treasure land at all.

So, she has to give a portion of the harvest appropriately.

Next, she took out the Origin Golden Bamboo from the other side and distributed it.
